changelog: Initial release. Replaces 68 per-account kms-template.yaml copies. Key policy principals (KeyAdminArn, KeyUsageArn) sourced from JSON config — security team owns policy, platform team owns template.
cfn_registry_note: In production: register as private module via 'aws cloudformation register-type --type MODULE --type-name TescoIMS::Security::KmsKey'. Set default with 'aws cloudformation set-type-default-version'.
